import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/saas_outreach.db'\)
conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row

# Check what data we have
total = conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM companies'\).fetchone\(\)[0]
with_video = conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM companies WHERE has_youtube_video = 1 OR has_website_video = 1'\).fetchone\(\)[0]
with_yt = conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM companies WHERE youtube_channel_url IS NOT NULL'\).fetchone\(\)[0]
videos = conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM company_videos'\).fetchone\(\)[0]
pending = conn.execute\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM company_videos WHERE review_status = 'pending'\\"\).fetchone\(\)[0]
approved = conn.execute\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM company_videos WHERE review_status = 'approved'\\"\).fetchone\(\)[0]
contacts = conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM contacts'\).fetchone\(\)[0]

print\(f'Companies: {total}'\)
print\(f'With video \(any\): {with_video}'\)
print\(f'With YouTube channel: {with_yt}'\)
print\(f'Videos found: {videos}'\)
print\(f'Videos pending review: {pending}'\)
print\(f'Videos approved: {approved}'\)
print\(f'Contacts: {contacts}'\)

# Sample company
print\(\)
r = conn.execute\('SELECT * FROM companies WHERE has_youtube_video = 1 LIMIT 1'\).fetchone\(\)
if r:
    print\('Sample company columns:', list\(r.keys\(\)\)\)
print\(\)
r2 = conn.execute\('SELECT * FROM company_videos LIMIT 1'\).fetchone\(\)
if r2:
    print\('Sample video columns:', list\(r2.keys\(\)\)\)
conn.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/saas_outreach.db'\)
conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row

# Get column names
cols = conn.execute\('PRAGMA table_info\(companies\)'\).fetchall\(\)
print\('companies columns:'\)
for c in cols:
    print\(f'  {c[1]} \({c[2]}\)'\)

print\(\)
cols2 = conn.execute\('PRAGMA table_info\(company_videos\)'\).fetchall\(\)
print\('company_videos columns:'\)
for c in cols2:
    print\(f'  {c[1]} \({c[2]}\)'\)

print\(\)
total = conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM companies'\).fetchone\(\)[0]
print\(f'Total companies: {total}'\)
videos = conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM company_videos'\).fetchone\(\)[0]
print\(f'Total videos: {videos}'\)

conn.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/Users/george.fakorellis/Desktop/SEO Custom Projects/saas-video-outreach" && python3.12 -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/saas_outreach.db'\)
conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row

# Stats
with_yt = conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM companies WHERE has_youtube_channel = 1'\).fetchone\(\)[0]
with_web_vid = conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM companies WHERE has_website_videos = 1'\).fetchone\(\)[0]
pending = conn.execute\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM company_videos WHERE review_status = 'pending'\\"\).fetchone\(\)[0]
approved = conn.execute\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM company_videos WHERE review_status = 'approved'\\"\).fetchone\(\)[0]
rejected = conn.execute\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM company_videos WHERE review_status = 'rejected'\\"\).fetchone\(\)[0]
with_dr = conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM companies WHERE domain_rating IS NOT NULL'\).fetchone\(\)[0]

print\(f'Total companies: 3,139'\)
print\(f'With YouTube channel: {with_yt}'\)
print\(f'With website videos: {with_web_vid}'\)
print\(f'With Ahrefs DR: {with_dr}'\)
print\(f'Videos pending: {pending}'\)
print\(f'Videos approved: {approved}'\)
print\(f'Videos rejected: {rejected}'\)

# Sample pending videos
print\(\)
print\('Sample pending videos:'\)
rows = conn.execute\('''
    SELECT cv.video_url, cv.title, cv.video_type, c.name, c.website_url, c.domain_rating, c.org_traffic
    FROM company_videos cv
    JOIN companies c ON cv.domain = c.domain
    WHERE cv.review_status = \\"pending\\"
    ORDER BY c.domain_rating DESC NULLS LAST
    LIMIT 5
'''\).fetchall\(\)
for r in rows:
    print\(f'  {r[\\"name\\"][:30]:<31} DR:{r[\\"domain_rating\\"] or 0:>5.0f}  {r[\\"video_type\\"]:>10}  {r[\\"title\\"][:40] if r[\\"title\\"] else \\"\(no title\)\\"}'\)

conn.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/saas_outreach.db'\)
conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
rows = conn.execute\('''
    SELECT video_url, video_type, COUNT\(*\) as cnt 
    FROM company_videos 
    WHERE review_status = \\"pending\\"
    GROUP BY video_type 
    ORDER BY cnt DESC
'''\).fetchall\(\)
print\('Video types:'\)
for r in rows:
    print\(f'  {r[\\"video_type\\"]:>20}: {r[\\"cnt\\"]}'\)

print\(\)
print\('Sample URLs per type:'\)
for vtype in ['youtube_embed', 'youtube_channel', 'unknown', 'vimeo', 'wistia']:
    rows = conn.execute\('SELECT video_url FROM company_videos WHERE video_type = ? LIMIT 3', \(vtype,\)\).fetchall\(\)
    if rows:
        print\(f'  {vtype}:'\)
        for r in rows:
            print\(f'    {r[0][:100]}'\)
conn.close\(\)
" 2>&1)
